data.title: A whale spent $1.53 million USDC to buy 255,547 BERA in the past 9 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, in the past 9 hours, a whale spent $1.53 million USDC and bought 255,547 BERA at an average price of $6.

data.title: A whale had $14 million of WBTC liquidated after BTC fell below $94,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Paidun monitoring, after BTC fell below US$94,000, an address (0xceef...ba42) was liquidated for about 150 WBTC (worth approximately US$14 million).

data.title: Hong Kong Grants License To Bullish, Expanding Virtual Asset Trading Platforms
data.description: According to Odaily, the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has granted a new license to the virtual asset trading platform Bullish, increasing the number of licensed platforms in Hong Kong to ten. Bullish's Senior Vice President and Global Head of Sales, Liu Dehao, highlighted Hong Kong as a crucial business hub, with over 100 employees currently based there. The company aims to focus on institutional business following the license approval. Currently, there are eight platforms on the list of applicants for virtual asset trading licenses. SFC's Executive Director of the Intermediaries Division, Ye Zhiheng, recently noted that the market is gaining a clearer understanding of the SFC's licensing standards. While more licenses are expected to be issued, approval will depend on whether applicants meet the necessary requirements.

data.title: LTP HK Secures Hong Kong SFC License for Regulated Activities
data.description: According to Odaily, cryptocurrency institutional broker LTP has announced that its Hong Kong subsidiary, LiquidityTech Limited (LTP HK), has received a license from the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) to conduct several regulated activities. The newly acquired license covers the following categories: Type 1 - dealing in securities, Type 2 - dealing in futures contracts, Type 4 - advising on securities, Type 5 - advising on futures contracts, and Type 9 - asset management. With these regulatory approvals, LTP HK is now authorized to offer a comprehensive range of regulated financial services to institutional clients, including proprietary trading firms, hedge funds, asset management companies, and corporate investors.

data.title: Musk to discuss plan with Trump to provide US taxpayers with 'DOGE dividend' tax rebate
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Musk will discuss with Trump the plan to provide a "DOGE dividend" tax refund to every taxpayer in the United States. (Watcher.Guru)

data.title: U.S. judge refuses to order temporary ban on Department of Government Efficiency access
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. District Judge Tanya Chutkan ruled that she refused to order the "Government Efficiency Department" to access the computer systems of federal agencies or instruct the dismissal of government employees during the litigation, rejecting the request made by the Democratic state attorney general. Attorneys general of more than a dozen U.S. states filed a lawsuit on the 13th, questioning the power of Musk and the "Government Efficiency Department" he leads to access sensitive government data. (Jinshi)

data.title: Planet Morning News
Yesterday, Fidelity FBTC had a net outflow of $16.4 million and FETH had a net inflow of $4.6 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Farside Investors data, Fidelity FBTC had a net outflow of $16.4 million yesterday, and FETH had a net inflow of $4.6 million.

data.title: LTP Receives Hong Kong Securities Regulatory Commission License to Expand Compliant Cryptocurrency Prime Broker Services
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Cryptocurrency institutional broker LTP announced that its Hong Kong subsidiary LiquidityTech Limited (LTP HK) has been licensed by the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) to carry out a number of regulated activities. The newly obtained licenses include:
Category 1-Securities Trading
Category 2-Futures Contract Trading
Category 4-Securities Advisory
Category 5-Futures Contract Advisory
Category 9-Asset Management
With these regulatory approvals, LTP HK is now allowed to provide a full range of regulated financial services to institutional clients, including proprietary trading firms, hedge funds, asset management companies and corporate investors. (CoinDesk)

data.title: The U.S. government's efficiency department is targeting the military sector, and the Department of Defense has listed a list of employees to be laid off
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, the U.S. government's efficiency department has set its sights on the military field, and the U.S. Department of Defense has listed a list of employees to be fired. (Jinshi)
